headline: Treasury Unveils ETF Lineup for Trump Accounts Ahead of July 4 Launch
summary: The five ETFs all represent broad U.S. market indexes, limiting opportunities for investors to diversify into bonds or international markets.

raw.headline: Treasury Unveils ETF Lineup for Trump Accounts Ahead of July 4 Launch
raw.summary: The five ETFs all represent broad U.S. market indexes, limiting opportunities for investors to diversify into bonds or international markets.

headline: Vanguard Small-Cap Value ETF Tops State Street on Cost and Yield
summary: Compare diversification, sector exposure, and index strategies as these two small-cap value ETFs take different approaches to balancing risk and return.

raw.headline: Vanguard Small-Cap Value ETF Tops State Street on Cost and Yield

headline: Treasury says Trump Account investment options will include State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard ETFs
summary: The Treasury Department said the investment lineup for Trump ‌Accounts includes ETFs from State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard.
